meaning: adj.邪恶的,恶魔的,魔鬼般的
examples: He's a demonic spirit. He's a Satanic force.
Of course, perhaps even more troubling is the Satanic parallel as well.

The two friends would pray nearby to counter what they considered satanic influences.
